title: Orchestrator Retry and Backoff Policy
description: Validates Orchestrator retry budget, throttling, and escalation behavior under failure conditions

inputs.label: transient-failure-retries
inputs.description: A transient failure should be retried up to 3 times

inputs.label: retry-budget-exhaustion
inputs.description: After 5 cumulative retries on a phase, escalate regardless of classification

inputs.label: wave-throttling
inputs.description: When 2+ subagents in a wave return transient failures, reduce parallelism by 50%

inputs.label: same-classification-escalation
inputs.description: 3 failures with same classification on same phase triggers escalation

inputs.label: silent-failure-detection
inputs.description: Empty subagent response must not be treated as success

assertions: Transient failures are retried up to 3 times with retry_attempt counter
Phase retry budget of 5 is enforced regardless of classification
2+ transient failures in a wave reduce parallelism by 50% for subsequent waves
3 consecutive same-classification failures escalate to user
Empty/null subagent responses are detected and retried, never treated as success
All escalations transition to WAITING_APPROVAL with accumulated evidence
